framework: Reforge 12 PM Competency Model by Ravi Mehta

days.theme: What the PM role actually is
days.brief: Covers the Reforge 12 PM Competency Model and the PM role as defined by Ravi Mehta and Marty Cagan. Includes a search on real APM structures at Indian companies. Activity: map 15 real Swiggy PM tasks to the 4 Reforge pillars to see how each competency shows up in day-to-day work.

days.theme: Structured thinking — MECE and first principles
days.brief: Covers MECE structured thinking and first principles reasoning — the two core frameworks for breaking down any ambiguous product problem. Includes a worked example search on metric drop trees. Activity: build a MECE tree for Zomato's Monday order volume drop.

days.theme: User thinking — Personas and Jobs-To-Be-Done
days.brief: Covers Jobs-to-be-Done (JTBD) and user persona construction — the two frameworks for understanding who you are building for and why. Includes a search on CRED's credit score user segmentation decision. Activity: build a persona, JTBD statement, and feature proposal from a real Zepto app store complaint.

days.theme: Problem framing and user research
days.brief: Covers how to write a properly scoped product problem statement and how to design a user interview script. Includes a search on how Razorpay reframed payment failures as a trust problem. Activity: reframe 3 vague problem statements and write a 5-question user interview guide.

days.theme: Prioritisation frameworks — RICE, ICE, and MoSCoW
days.brief: Covers RICE prioritization (Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort) and how to score features objectively against each other. Includes a search on RICE worked examples. Activity: RICE-score 8 PhonePe features live, with a skeptical PM lead pushing back on weak justifications.

days.theme: Product design frameworks — CIRCLES and BUS
days.brief: Covers the CIRCLES product design framework (Comprehend, Identify, Report, Cut, List, Evaluate, Summarise) used in PM case interviews. Includes a search on CIRCLES applied to Indian fintech. Activity: complete a live CIRCLES walkthrough for a CRED credit score feature in interview simulation format.

days.theme: Week 1 integration — end-to-end case using all Week 1 tools
days.brief: Week 1 integration day. Reads Marty Cagan on the four big product risks. One guided warm-up activity applies all 5 Week 1 tools — MECE, Personas, JTBD, RICE, CIRCLES — to a fictional fintech KYC drop-off case. Full 60-minute integration assessment follows.

days.theme: North Star metric + AARRR funnel + SQL intro
days.brief: Covers North Star metric definition and the AARRR funnel (Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Revenue, Referral). Includes a search on how Zepto and CRED have fundamentally different North Stars. SQL parallel: read a real SELECT + GROUP BY query, explain what it returns, and extend it.

days.theme: Diagnosing metric drops and root cause analysis
days.brief: Covers structured metric drop diagnosis and root cause analysis (RCA) tree construction. Includes a search on Swiggy order drop case studies. SQL parallel: given a query output table, identify the data anomaly and state what it tells you about the drop.

days.theme: A/B testing and experimentation
days.brief: Covers A/B testing design: hypothesis, control and treatment variants, primary metric, guardrail metrics, and minimum detectable effect. Includes a search on experimentation at Indian consumer apps. Activity: design and stress-test a complete A/B test plan for removing Zomato's tip prompt.

days.theme: Analytics tools, SQL verification, and cohort retention
days.brief: Covers product analytics tools (Mixpanel, Amplitude) and how PMs read funnel and cohort data. SQL parallel: verify whether a plain-English analyst request matches a given SQL query. Excel parallel: given a 6-month cohort retention table, identify where users drop off and extract 3 insights.

days.theme: PRDs, user stories, and Figma feedback
days.brief: Covers PRD structure and user story writing with acceptance criteria. Figma parallel: write 3 structured PM feedback comments on a Zepto cart screen wireframe — one comment per design issue in annotation format. Assessment: write a mini PRD for a 'Save for Later' cart feature.

days.theme: Roadmapping and stakeholder communication
days.brief: Covers product roadmapping (Now/Next/Later) and how PMs communicate the roadmap differently to engineering, sales, and leadership. Excel parallel: sort 10 Razorpay features into a Now/Next/Later grid. Activity: write a leadership update on a PhonePe KYC flow post-launch.

days.theme: Week 2 integration — full execution simulation
days.brief: Week 2 integration day. Applies all Week 2 tools — RCA, hypothesis, mini PRD, OKRs, and leadership update — to a single fictional lending app complaint spike. Full 60-minute case with 5 deliverables: RCA tree, top hypothesis, PRD, OKRs, and a 5-line leadership update.

days.theme: Strategy, market sizing, OKRs, and TAM/SAM/SOM
days.brief: Covers product strategy thinking, market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), and OKR writing. Includes a search on Zomato's B2B catering market entry analysis. Excel parallel: build a TAM/SAM/SOM model for Indian quick commerce using given population and spending assumptions.

days.theme: Indian product landscape deep dive
days.brief: Covers competitive analysis frameworks and the Indian consumer internet landscape — Swiggy vs Zomato vs Blinkit as three companies making three different strategic bets. Activity: compare CRED and PhonePe across 5 strategic dimensions and write a product recommendation.

days.theme: Bharat vs India: Designing for India's Next 400 Million Users
days.brief: Covers the Bharat vs India user divide, Jio's product decisions for 400M new internet users, and ONDC. Includes a search on Tier 2/3 user behaviour and design assumptions. Figma parallel: redesign the Zepto cart screen for a Hindi-speaking Tier 2 user with structured annotations for every change.

days.theme: Case Practice: Product Design + Estimation + API Basics
days.brief: Covers API basics for PMs — what REST APIs are, latency, rate limits, and what questions to ask engineering before writing a spec. Includes a search on PM API literacy. Activity: map every API behind Rapido's fare estimate feature and write the two PM questions for each dependency.

days.theme: Case Practice: Metrics + Strategy
days.brief: Covers metric drop diagnosis and strategy case frameworks used in APM interviews. Warm-up coaching session with a mini RCA and mini strategy framing before timed cases. Assessment: two cases — Swiggy order volume drop RCA (25 min) and Swiggy grocery subscription strategy recommendation (20 min).

days.theme: Behavioral Cases + Influencing People
days.brief: Covers behavioral interviews for PMs, the STAR method, and influencing without authority. Includes a search on real behavioral questions from Flipkart, Razorpay, and CRED panels. Activity: STAR story construction with a coach. Assessment: write 4 STAR stories and run a full mock behavioral interview.

days.theme: Final Integration + Personal Gap Map
days.brief: Final integration day covering all 12 Reforge competencies. Returns to Ravi Mehta's competency model as a Day 21 retrospective. OKR self-evaluation: did you hit your Day 15 OKRs? 3-part assessment: full B2B SaaS churn case, self-score across all 12 competencies, and a personal next-30-days improvement plan.
